title: Eval Question
description: Benchmark question for model evaluation. Used in 4-eval-clarify/2-test-data/evaluation/*-benchmark/

category.description: Primary domain (python, bash, kubernetes, aws, terraform, etc.)

subcategory.description: Specific topic within the domain (e.g., bandit, pip-audit, iam)

question.description: The question to ask the model

expected_keywords.description: Keywords that should appear in a correct response

expected_fix_contains.description: Specific string the fix must contain (optional, for fix-required questions)

keywords_required.description: Minimum keywords to match for a pass

workflow_required.description: Whether a multi-step workflow must be present
